top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    customer_address.ca_state = 'NC'
    AND date_dim.d_date >= '2000-08-23'
    AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10...

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    customer_address.ca_state = 'NC'
    AND date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '2000-08-23' AND '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    customer_address.ca_state = 'NC'
    AND date_dim.d_date >= '2000-08-23'
    AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10...
